## The 3 Things Members Always Ask

<callout icon="❓" color="blue_bg">
	**How do I join?** Register at the registration link, free with your NAS.com membership. Open Sun Jun 14 to Sat Jun 20. Challenge starts Sun Jun 21.
	**What is the prize?** $1,000 in Nas.com credits. Grand $500, Runner-Up $300, Honorable Mention $100, Community MVP $100.
	**When are winners announced?** Live at the Summit, Wed Jul 8, 11:00pm to 2:00am SGT. You must be present (we email everyone beforehand).
</callout>

## What This Challenge Is

Members build their first AI marketing agent, a proactive agent in Claude that, every morning, researches a fresh content idea for their business and turns it into a ready-to-run prompt. By Graduation each member has a working agent that hands them an idea and a prompt daily.

## The Summit (Wed Jul 8)

Three experts each build a different agent live: research, image, find-customers. Top graduates featured. Winners announced live, be present. Full run of show in the Summit Trainer Brief and Session Flow.

Issued via Nas.com after the Summit (about Jul 9). $1,000 across 4 prizes, matching the previous challenge. Full rules in Competition Rules & Entry Process.

## Scope for This Round

In: clear emails, WhatsApp nudges, competition and submission form, prep checklist, exact dates. Out: social posts, image assets, daily email nudges.
